description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a compact rectangular footprint and a low-pitched roof. The exterior features a combination of light and dark surfaces, with the main structure appearing to be constructed from concrete or stucco, accented by darker roofing material. The roof is flat and extends slightly beyond the walls, providing a modern, streamlined appearance. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with several grouped on one side and fewer on the other, suggesting a focus on natural light for specific rooms. The entrance is set back and partially sheltered, but there is no visible porch or veranda. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a functional layout typical of modern urban bungalows.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, asymmetrical window arrangement, and minimalist design in light and dark tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance and a cluster of windows on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof and a lighter wall section with fewer windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal window openings and a clear view of the building's rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the darker roof overhang and additional window placements.
